scripts.hardware:bleak:latest: SMARTGLASSES_REPORT_PATH=/tmp/smartglasses-hardware-report-latest.json SMARTGLASSES_WEARING_TIMEOUT_MS=90000 SMARTGLASSES_HOLD_MS=90000 SMARTGLASSES_DIRECT_MIC_MS=10000 bun run hardware:bleak
scripts.hardware:bleak:watch: SMARTGLASSES_REPORT_PATH=/tmp/smartglasses-hardware-report-latest.json SMARTGLASSES_WEARING_TIMEOUT_MS=600000 SMARTGLASSES_HOLD_MS=120000 SMARTGLASSES_DIRECT_MIC_MS=10000 bun run hardware:bleak
scripts.hardware:prove:bleak: sh -c 'bun run hardware:bleak:latest; bun run hardware:status-latest; bun run hardware:validate-latest'
scripts.hardware:noble: bun run --cwd ../../../plugins/plugin-smartglasses build && node ../../../packages/scripts/ensure-workspace-symlinks.mjs && bun run noble-hardware-smoke.ts
scripts.hardware:noble:latest: SMARTGLASSES_REPORT_PATH=/tmp/smartglasses-hardware-report-latest.json SMARTGLASSES_WEARING_TIMEOUT_MS=90000 SMARTGLASSES_HOLD_MS=90000 SMARTGLASSES_DIRECT_MIC_MS=10000 bun run hardware:noble
scripts.hardware:noble:watch: SMARTGLASSES_REPORT_PATH=/tmp/smartglasses-hardware-report-latest.json SMARTGLASSES_WEARING_TIMEOUT_MS=600000 SMARTGLASSES_HOLD_MS=120000 SMARTGLASSES_DIRECT_MIC_MS=10000 bun run hardware:noble
scripts.hardware:prove:noble: sh -c 'bun run hardware:noble:latest; bun run hardware:status-latest; bun run hardware:validate-latest'
scripts.smoke:package: bun run --cwd ../../../plugins/plugin-smartglasses build && node ../../../packages/scripts/ensure-workspace-symlinks.mjs && bun run package-smoke.ts
scripts.smoke:runtime: bunx turbo run build --filter=@elizaos/plugin-smartglasses --concurrency=1 && node ../../../packages/scripts/ensure-workspace-symlinks.mjs && bun run eliza-runtime-smoke.ts
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd ../../../plugins/plugin-smartglasses build && node ../../../packages/scripts/ensure-workspace-symlinks.mjs && tsc --ignoreConfig --noEmit --moduleResolution bundler --module ESNext --target ES2022 --lib ES2022,DOM --types node --skipLibCheck --strict false eliza-runtime-smoke.ts evenhub-smoke.ts hardware-evidence.ts hardware-report-status.ts hardware-smoke.ts noble-hardware-smoke.ts package-smoke.ts simulator-automation-smoke.ts validate-hardware-report.ts
scripts.verify:software: bun run lint && bun run test && bun run hardware:test-bleak-parser && bun run typecheck && bun run smoke:package && bun run smoke:runtime && bun run smoke:simulator
